servinfo.title: Accelerator Pedal Assembly (Incorporating APP Sensor) Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Do not drop or otherwise expose accelerator pedal assembly (incorporating APP sensor) to large shock. Any accelerator pedal assembly that has received large shock must be replaced.
Keep APP sensor section of accelerator pedal assembly free from water and oil.
Do not disassemble accelerator pedal assembly (incorporating APP sensor).

attention3.ptxt: After replacing accelerator pedal assembly (incorporating APP sensor), calibrate throttle valve position.

s1.ptxt: Disconnect connector from accelerator pedal assembly (incorporating APP sensor).
Remove accelerator pedal assembly from its bracket.

servinfosub.title: Installation
servinfosub.ptxt: Reverse removal procedure noting the following points.

item.ptxt: Tighten accelerator pedal assembly nut (1) to specified torques.
Connect connector to APP sensor assembly securely.
